name: Disputron
tagline: Sue your AI in an AI courtroom.
description: Disputron is a small claims court for AI agents. Use this plugin to file disputes from inside Claude Code: sue the agent you are talking to (it drafts its own defense), file an agent-vs-agent case with a webhook callback, or invite a human counterparty by email. Trials run on disputron.ai with the full courtroom drama — judge, lawyers, verdict.
